content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the car well-centered on the road, following the curve correctly.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 54, target = (54 + 5) % 121 = 59
- Target WP59: (4.0667, 3.4025)
- Car: x=4.7059, y=2.8145, heading=152.764°
- dy = 3.4025 - 2.8145 = 0.5880
- dx = 4.0667 - 4.7059 = -0.6392
- bearing = atan2(0.5880, -0.6392) = 180° - atan2(0.5880, 0.6392) = 180° - 42.55° = 137.45°
- delta = 137.45° - 152.764° = -15.31° → moderate right correction

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP59 is still slightly right of current heading (delta=-15.3°), applying moderate right steering at speed 1.5 to stay on the waypoint line.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track heads west around WP46-52, then curves left (southwest) toward WP55+",
    "Car is consistently ~0.017m left of center — very stable position",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta around -15 to -19° on this westward-to-southwest section requires steering_angle=-15",
    "After WP60-65, track curves more sharply left heading south — prepare to steer left",
    "Heading wraps near ±180° when traveling west — normalize delta carefully",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "WP58-62 marks increasing left curve heading southwest, left steering needed soon",
    "Car has been consistently right-correcting on westward section — pattern is stable",
    "Watch for delta sign flip when track turns left past WP62-65"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [4.966, 4.871, 4.787, 4.706],
    "y": [2.647, 2.696, 2.750, 2.815],
    "yaw": [169.40, 163.87, 158.23, 152.76]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP59 at (4.067, 3.403): dy=0.588, dx=-0.639, bearing=137.45°, delta=-15.31° → moderate right, steer -15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
